meta.title: Echoes — Where words meet people
meta.description: Discover, collect, and share quotes that resonate. Build collaborative folders, follow curators, and grow your personal library of ideas.

hero.title: Where words
hero.subtitle: Echoes is the place to discover, collect, and share quotes. Build collaborative folders, follow curators, and grow your personal library of ideas.
hero.featuredQuote: Life is too short to be small.

manifesto.label: Our manifesto
manifesto.title: Quotes deserve more than a screenshot.
manifesto.body: Every line that touched you is part of who you are. Echoes was born so those words don't get lost in forgotten screenshots — but turn into living collections, shared with the people who matter.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to curate words.

items.title: Discover
items.body: Explore a growing catalog of quotes by theme, author, and category. Sharp filters and semantic search.

items.title: Collect
items.body: Favorite or organize into themed folders. No quote limits, no folder limits.

items.title: Collaborate
items.body: Invite friends to co-create folders. Set roles: owner, editor, or read-only.

items.title: Share
items.body: Elegant cards ready for Instagram, WhatsApp, and Twitter. Your aesthetic, no watermark.

items.title: Follow
items.body: Keep up with curators and friends. See what they're adding to public folders in real time.

items.title: Discover again
items.body: Popular folders, affinity suggestions, trending profiles. Always something new to save.

folders.label: Folders
folders.title: Living collections, Pinterest-style.
folders.subtitle: Collaborative folders with generated covers, custom order, and social context. Public or private, solo or with co-authors.

showcase.label: The app
showcase.title: Crafted in every detail.
showcase.subtitle: Editorial typography, terracotta and sage palette, native dark mode. Built with React Native — light, fast, offline-first.

cta.title: Start collecting today.
cta.subtitle: Free, no ads. iOS and Android.
